ops.title: v0.33.0 ships the two 2026-07-14 papercut fixes
ops.body: Both papercuts from the 2026-07-14 session are fixed and released in v0.33.0 (tag on 08187680): (1) kind-scoped misses now cross-kind scan and hint the actual kind plus the kind-agnostic 'cc-notes show' (crosskind.go choke-pointed at kindSpec.load; resolveAnyEntity/ambiguousAcrossKinds deleted in favor of notes.Client.ResolveEntity, fixing the every-ambiguous-match-labeled-note bug); (2) MCP unknown-key tool calls now name accepted properties with did-you-mean synonyms via a pre-validating AddReceivingMiddleware (toolset records schemas at registration via jsonschema.For; TestToolsetRecordsEveryTool guards the raw-AddTool bypass). BREAKING: MCP papercut arg text renamed to body. Release notes on the GitHub release; tap bumped to 0.33.0; fleet heals at next run via releases/latest.
